title: Trendy Thread
description: A stylish fashion website built to explore and search clothing collections easily. It provides a simple and attractive interface for users to browse trendy outfits and discover fashion items quickly.

title: Simple Login Page
description: A basic web application designed with a clean login interface and student feedback functionality. It helps users submit and manage feedback in a simple and user-friendly way.

title: Tic Tac Toe Game
description: An interactive Tic Tac Toe game developed using React. It allows users to play the classic game with a smooth interface and dynamic game updates.

title: Insta Clone
description: A desktop-view Instagram clone built with React that recreates the look and feel of the Instagram interface. It focuses on UI design and basic social media layout experience.

title: Flower Shop
description: An online flower and garlands purchasing platform where users can browse products and place orders. It is built as a full stack application with both frontend and backend integration.
